pageSubtitle: Automate WhatsApp review requests after each sale — Zenith plan.
paywallBody: Automatic review collection via WhatsApp (POS connection, courtesy window, GDPR) is available exclusively on the Zenith plan.
section1Intro: Set the ideal delay before a message is sent to your customers after their visit.
businessTypeHint: Recorded business type when you save:
ecommerceStrategyIntro: REPUTEXA watches the tracking number. The countdown only starts when the parcel is officially delivered (carrier scan).
ecommerceStrategyImmediate: Immediate gratification (fashion, gadgets) — send 2h after “Delivered” scan
ecommerceStrategyTestMount: Assembly & testing (furniture, electronics) — send 24h after “Delivered” scan
ecommerceStrategyCustom: Custom — choose the delay after the “Delivered” scan
ecommerceUxAfterDelivery: After-delivery reviews: the webhook must send status (e.g. Delivered) and whatsapp_consent: true once the parcel is delivered.
ecommerceUxSend2h: REPUTEXA sends the WhatsApp 2h after the “Delivered” scan (carrier).
ecommerceUxSend24h: REPUTEXA sends the WhatsApp 24h after the “Delivered” scan (carrier).
ecommerceUxSendCustom: REPUTEXA sends the WhatsApp {delay} after the “Delivered” scan (carrier).
ecommerceUxShippedOnly: If status is shipped only, nothing is scheduled until it is delivered.
ecommerceUxRich: <lead>After-delivery reviews</lead>: the webhook must send <mono>status</mono> (e.g. Delivered) and <mono>whatsapp_consent: true</mono> once the parcel is delivered.
ecommerceUxPhysical: The system automatically picks a suitable moment <delay /> with light random variation so it feels natural.
toastTokenOk: Legacy token regenerated. Update your POS if you still use this method.
toastApiKeyOk: New key generated. Update your POS configuration immediately.

custom.label: Custom (free delay)
custom.example: You set the exact delay in minutes

rgpdSectionIntro: For online stores, explicit customer consent before any WhatsApp message is mandatory. Use the text below in your checkout flow.
rgpdConsentBody: I agree to receive a one-off WhatsApp invitation from {establishment} via our partner REPUTEXA to share my review after receiving my parcel.
rgpdShopifyLi3: Check <bold>“Show a subscription opt-in at checkout”</bold>.
rgpdShopifyLi4: In <bold>“Subscription text”</bold>, paste the REPUTEXA text (copied above).
rgpdStripeLi1: In Stripe Dashboard open <bold>Checkout & Payment Links</bold>.
rgpdStripeLi4: Use the <bold>REPUTEXA consent text</bold> as the label (copied above).
rgpdClauseHeading: Clause for your Terms / Privacy policy
rgpdClauseInstruction: <bold>Instruction:</bold> copy the clause below into your terms and replace “Article [X]” with the correct number.
rgpdClauseBody: Article [X] – Review collection and customer satisfaction: To improve our services we use REPUTEXA to request reviews after your purchases. If you consented during checkout, your data (first name, phone number, order details) will be transmitted securely. REPUTEXA acts as a processor; data is used only for a single WhatsApp invitation and is never sold to third parties.
rgpdNoteBody: Adding this clause is required to meet your duty to inform customers. If you do not insert or actually apply it on your site and documents, compliance of your journey is your sole responsibility; without this implementation REPUTEXA cannot be held liable for any shortcomings related to information or consent.
certificateTip: Summary document for your records (customers, insurer or authority): published legal version in force, last Guardian cycle, account commitment — REPUTEXA timestamped trail.
section2IntroPhysical: Give these credentials to your POS vendor to automate sending.
section2IntroEcommerce: Share this link with your integrator or automation tool (Zapier, Make, etc.) to trigger after delivery.
webhookRotateWarning: Rotating the key revokes the old URL — update your POS / Zapier immediately.
noApiKey: No API key generated for this account.
rotateKeyTitle: Generate a new key (revokes the previous URL immediately)
zapierHint: Your till does not support direct webhooks?
posterTip: Tip: A4 at the counter; A5 if space is tight; A3 for a wall poster. Print at 100%, without “Fit to page”.
ecommerceCheckoutNote: For online stores, actually inserting the clause (section 1) and applying it in your checkout is your responsibility. Without this on your site, REPUTEXA cannot be held liable for shortcomings in information or consent collection.
payloadNoAuthNote: No authentication header required — the key is in the URL.
ecomCardIdentityBody: first_name and phone — required for WhatsApp.
ecomCardComplianceBody: whatsapp_consent must be true to allow sending.
ecomCardLogisticsBody: status triggers sending once the parcel is marked delivered (e.g. Delivered, Livré, Zugestellt…) — tracking_number optional.
webhookPhysicalPayloadExplainer: For physical retail, this JSON body replaces client-side entry on the terminal: the till sends first name, phone and optionally the purchase label to personalize the WhatsApp invite.
statGeneratedSub: Polished text & published by the customer
auditTitle: Log — where did the outreach come from?
auditIntro: Each line shows the entry path (API-key webhook or Zenith), receipt date, known context and status. Phone partially masked here; full detail (e.g. IP) in the GDPR export (Settings → Download my data).
auditRetention: Queue identifiers are anonymised or erased within 120 days (aggregated stats may be kept). A new WhatsApp outreach for the same number is not sent until 120 days after the previous campaign started; after that, a new send is possible unless the user opted out (STOP).

zapier.title: Connect via Zapier
zapier.subtitle: 6,000+ compatible apps — no code
zapier.t2a: Search for "Webhooks by Zapier" in apps
zapier.t2c: Zapier gives you a link → copy it into your software as the send URL
zapier.t3a: Search again for “Webhooks by Zapier” in actions
zapier.t3c: Copy your REPUTEXA link below, then fill the Zapier form field by field
zapier.ecoStatus: Delivery status — sending is scheduled if Delivered
zapier.ecoQueueNote: Until the parcel is not Delivered, nothing is queued.
zapier.reassurance: If you see other options, ignore them. Your setup is already correct.
zapier.footerTeam: Our technical team is here to help.

ecommerceModalTitle: Sending WhatsApp in e-commerce requires adding Article X wording to your terms and a checkbox in checkout. Have you configured your checkout flow?
ecommerceModalWarning: Running campaigns without these legal elements is entirely your responsibility. If the clause and checkbox are not actually implemented on your site, REPUTEXA cannot be held liable for shortcomings related to information or consent.
ecommerceModalCta: I commit to configuring my checkout
pageFooterLegal: REPUTEXA is a technical provider (processor). Using this service implies acceptance of our Terms of Use, which state that collecting customer consent is solely the end user's responsibility.
